title: eriogonum microtheca var. foliosum
intro: Eriogonum microtheca var. foliosum, also known as leafy desert buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum microtheca var. foliosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
